summary: Tested P0/P1 code quality fixes: __cat__: trade prefix normalization in Preview modal and JobCard, 'Primary Trade' label on profile edit, auth flow (contractor + crew login/logout), contractor dashboard, crew dashboard, messages page with URL-based thread opening.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All code quality fixes verified. __cat__: prefix properly stripped in Preview modal (normalizeTrade called on preview) and JobCard (line 59). Primary Trade label correct on profile edit form. Auth flow works for both contractor and crew. Messages page thread opening from URL (?thread=ID) works correctly. Crew dashboard and contractor dashboard both load properly.
passed_tests: Contractor dashboard loads with Post Job button
Job form opens with Trade select showing __cat__: options as '— Carpentry (all) —'
Preview modal shows 'Carpentry' (not '__cat__:Carpentry') when category trade selected
No __cat__ prefix appears anywhere in preview page text
Crew dashboard loads with map, job list, stats
Profile edit form shows 'Primary Trade' label for trade field
Messages page loads for crew user
Clicking thread item updates URL with ?thread=ID
Navigating directly to /messages?thread={id} auto-opens the thread with messages visible
